Xilang Electric Co., Ltd. is a newly established (August 2023), robustly capitalized manufacturing enterprise located in Chuzhou, Anhui. Despite having no recorded former names, its Unified Social Credit Code (91131026) bears the geographic prefix of Xianghe County, Cangzhou, Hebei Province, strongly indicating a strategic relocation or a 'born-in-relocation' entity funded by Hebei capital. As a wholly-owned corporate subsidiary ('non-natural person invested') with 16.66M RMB paid-in capital and 64 insured employees, it represents a substantial, immediate deployment of physical manufacturing capacity in the Nanqiao Economic Development Zone. The company focuses heavily on smart power distribution, switch control equipment, and related electrical installations.
